chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3103 of 2017 CP D 3104 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case 28-03-2025 Mr. Muhammad Mustafa, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondent Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Mr. Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Per learned counsel, the purpose of these petitions has been served, therefore, the same may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is directed to place copy hereof in connected petition. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
